metadata.name: Robot Skill Ontology
metadata.design_principle: Plan over abstract skills first, verify robot capabilities second, and ground to ROS 2 implementations only after capability verification.

skill_schema.skill_id: Stable unique identifier such as NAV_001.
skill_schema.goal: Planner-level intent achieved by the skill.
skill_schema.aliases: Natural language phrases that should map to this skill.
skill_schema.required_capabilities: Capability keys expected in Robot Capability JSON.
skill_schema.required_components: Physical or software components usually required.
skill_schema.inputs: Named inputs with semantic or ROS-compatible types.
skill_schema.outputs: Named outputs with semantic or ROS-compatible types.
skill_schema.preconditions: Conditions that should hold before execution.
skill_schema.implementations: Known ROS 2 or library interfaces that may ground the abstract skill.

skills.description: Navigate autonomously to a specified target pose while avoiding obstacles.
skills.goal: Move the robot from its current location to a destination pose.

skills.description: Follow a supplied path made of ordered poses.
skills.goal: Track a path from the current pose to the final path pose.
postconditions: Robot reached the end of the path

skills.description: Navigate through a sequence of waypoint poses.
skills.goal: Visit ordered waypoints in the requested sequence.
postconditions: Requested waypoints visited or reported as missed

skills.description: Navigate back to a predefined home pose or origin location.
skills.goal: Return the robot to its home location.

skills.description: Approach and connect to a charging or service dock.
skills.goal: Place the robot in a docked state.

skills.description: Disconnect from a dock and move into a ready navigation pose.
skills.goal: Place the robot in an undocked state ready for motion.

skills.description: Cancel the currently executing navigation goal.
skills.goal: Stop the active navigation task cleanly.
postconditions: Navigation goal canceled or no active goal remains

skills.description: Temporarily pause navigation execution while preserving the goal.
skills.goal: Hold the active navigation task without discarding it.

skills.description: Resume a previously paused navigation task.
skills.goal: Continue navigation toward the existing target.

skills.description: Repeatedly navigate through patrol points or an assigned area.
skills.goal: Cover an area or route for monitoring.
postconditions: Patrol route completed or mission remains active

skills.description: Track and follow a person while maintaining safe motion.
skills.goal: Move with a target person at an appropriate following distance.
postconditions: Robot followed the person until stopped or target lost

skills.description: Maintain a target distance from an object, person, or reference pose.
skills.goal: Keep separation within configured distance limits.
postconditions: Robot maintained requested distance while task remained active

skills.description: Autonomously explore an unknown or partially known environment.
skills.goal: Increase mapped or observed coverage of the environment.

skills.description: Navigate to the pose of a detected or named object.
skills.goal: Reach a navigation pose near the target object.
postconditions: Robot reached an approach pose near the object

skills.description: Navigate to a named room or semantic place in an indoor map.
skills.goal: Move the robot to the requested room.
postconditions: Robot reached the room or its doorway

skills.description: Pick up an object using an end effector.
skills.goal: Secure the target object in the robot gripper or end effector.

skills.description: Place a held object at a target pose or support surface.
skills.goal: Release the held object at the requested location.

skills.description: Close the end effector around an object to establish a grasp.
skills.goal: Create a stable grasp on the object.

skills.description: Open or deactivate the end effector to release a held object.
skills.goal: Let go of the currently held object.
postconditions: End effector open or object released

skills.description: Move the robot arm to a named, joint, or Cartesian target.
skills.goal: Position the manipulator for a task.

skills.description: Command one or more manipulator joints to target positions.
skills.goal: Reach specified joint values.

skills.description: Move the end effector to a Cartesian pose.
skills.goal: Place the tool center point at the requested pose.

skills.description: Reach toward a pose without necessarily grasping an object.
skills.goal: Move the manipulator into reach position for interaction.

skills.description: Apply force to move an object away or along a direction.
skills.goal: Displace the target object by pushing.

skills.description: Apply force to move an object toward the robot or along a pull direction.
skills.goal: Displace the target object by pulling.

skills.description: Open a drawer by grasping or hooking its handle and pulling.
skills.goal: Move the drawer to an open state.

skills.description: Close an open drawer by pushing it inward.
skills.goal: Move the drawer to a closed state.

skills.description: Open a hinged or sliding door using manipulation and optional navigation.
skills.goal: Move the door to an open state.

skills.description: Close a hinged or sliding door.
skills.goal: Move the door to a closed state.

skills.description: Rotate a grasped or contacted object around a specified axis.
skills.goal: Change the orientation of the target object.

skills.description: Lift a held or grasped object upward.
skills.goal: Increase the object's height while maintaining control.

skills.description: Lower a held or grasped object downward.
skills.goal: Decrease the object's height while maintaining control.

skills.description: Move a held object toward another agent for transfer.
skills.goal: Present an object so another agent can take it.

skills.description: Receive an object from a human or another robot.
skills.goal: Secure an externally offered object.

skills.description: Perform a complete handover protocol with another agent.
skills.goal: Transfer object ownership safely.
postconditions: Object transferred or transfer aborted safely

skills.description: Pick an object from a shelf or storage location.
skills.goal: Remove a target object from a shelf and hold it.

skills.description: Place a held object onto a shelf or storage surface.
skills.goal: Store the object on a shelf.

skills.description: Place one object on top of another in a stable stack.
skills.goal: Create or extend a stack of objects.
postconditions: Top object placed on base object

skills.description: Remove an object from the top of a stack.
skills.goal: Separate stacked objects safely.

skills.description: Insert an object into a slot, container, fixture, or assembly.
skills.goal: Place an object into a constrained target.

skills.description: Remove an object from a container, slot, fixture, or assembly.
skills.goal: Extract a target object from a constrained location.

skills.description: Press a physical button or touch target.
skills.goal: Actuate a button by contact.

skills.description: Grasp and rotate a knob, dial, or similar control.
skills.goal: Rotate the control to a target angle or state.

skills.description: Flip or toggle a physical switch.
skills.goal: Change a switch state.

skills.description: Use an attached or grasped tool to perform a tool-specific operation.
skills.goal: Execute an operation with a tool.

skills.description: Detect objects in sensor data.
skills.goal: Return object detections with labels and confidence.

skills.description: Detect people in sensor data.
skills.goal: Return human detections with confidence.

skills.description: Detect human faces in images.
skills.goal: Return face bounding boxes or landmarks.

skills.description: Detect fiducial markers such as AprilTag or ArUco.
skills.goal: Return marker IDs and poses.

skills.description: Identify the class or identity of an observed object.
skills.goal: Assign semantic identity to a detected object.

skills.description: Identify or re-identify a person.
skills.goal: Associate a detected person with an identity or track ID.
preconditions: Recognition enrollment available if identity required
postconditions: Person identity or track ID available

skills.description: Segment an image or point cloud into semantic regions or object masks.
skills.goal: Produce regions, masks, or clusters for scene elements.

skills.description: Estimate the robot, sensor, or target pose.
skills.goal: Provide a pose estimate in a known frame.

skills.description: Estimate a target object's 3D pose.
skills.goal: Return object position and orientation in a known frame.

skills.description: Decode a QR code from image data.
skills.goal: Return QR payload text.

skills.description: Decode a barcode from image data.
skills.goal: Return barcode payload text.

skills.description: Read text from image data.
skills.goal: Convert visible text into machine-readable text.

skills.description: Assign an observed object to a semantic class.
skills.goal: Produce an object class label and confidence.

skills.description: Count objects matching a query or class.
skills.goal: Return the number of detected objects.

skills.description: Find the location of a named or described object.
skills.goal: Return a map, image, or 3D location for the object.

skills.description: Track an object's position across time.
skills.goal: Maintain a target object track.

skills.description: Track a person's position across time.
skills.goal: Maintain a target person track.

skills.description: Estimate distance to a target object, surface, or obstacle.
skills.goal: Return range from the robot or sensor to a target.

skills.description: Detect obstacles in the robot's operating space.
skills.goal: Identify obstacles relevant to safe motion.

skills.description: Detect navigable free space in sensor data or a costmap.
skills.goal: Identify areas safe for motion or placement.

skills.description: Detect tables or horizontal support surfaces.
skills.goal: Return table detections or surface planes.

skills.description: Detect shelves or shelf compartments.
skills.goal: Return shelf pose, bounds, or compartment locations.

skills.description: Detect doors, doorways, handles, or door state.
skills.goal: Return door location and state.

skills.description: Detect visible liquid, spill, or fluid level.
skills.goal: Return liquid presence, region, or level estimate.

skills.description: Detect a human gesture from visual or body-pose data.
skills.goal: Return a recognized gesture label.

skills.description: Transcribe spoken language from audio input.
skills.goal: Convert speech audio into text.

skills.description: Classify or identify non-speech sounds.
skills.goal: Return a sound event label.

skills.description: Estimate illumination level or lighting quality.
skills.goal: Determine whether lighting is sufficient for task execution.

skills.description: Build or update a map with semantic labels.
skills.goal: Maintain spatial knowledge of places, objects, or regions.

skills.description: Produce a high-level semantic interpretation of the current scene.
skills.goal: Summarize relevant objects, agents, places, and relations.

skills.description: Move the robot forward for a distance or duration.
skills.goal: Translate forward under local control.
postconditions: Robot moved forward or command completed

skills.description: Move the robot backward for a distance or duration.
skills.goal: Translate backward under local control.
postconditions: Robot moved backward or command completed

skills.description: Rotate the robot left about its vertical axis.
skills.goal: Change heading counterclockwise.

skills.description: Rotate the robot right about its vertical axis.
skills.goal: Change heading clockwise.

skills.description: Move laterally to the robot's left without changing heading.
skills.goal: Translate left under local control.

skills.description: Move laterally to the robot's right without changing heading.
skills.goal: Translate right under local control.

skills.description: Command the robot to stop ordinary motion.
skills.goal: Bring commanded velocity to zero.

skills.description: Trigger emergency stop or safety halt.
skills.goal: Immediately stop unsafe robot motion.
postconditions: Robot motion halted by safety system

skills.description: Change maximum or commanded motion speed.
skills.goal: Set a desired speed limit or velocity.

skills.description: Change acceleration or deceleration limits.
skills.goal: Set motion acceleration behavior.

skills.description: Switch between supported locomotion modes or controller modes.
skills.goal: Use the requested mobility mode.

skills.description: Actively stabilize the robot body or base.
skills.goal: Maintain stable posture or base state.

skills.description: Maintain or recover balance for legged or unstable robots.
skills.goal: Keep the robot balanced.

skills.description: Move upward along an inclined ramp.
skills.goal: Ascend a ramp safely.
postconditions: Robot reached top or target ramp pose

skills.description: Move downward along an inclined ramp.
skills.goal: Descend a ramp safely.
postconditions: Robot reached bottom or target ramp pose

skills.description: Generate spoken output from text.
skills.goal: Communicate a message audibly.

skills.description: Show text on a screen or user interface.
skills.goal: Communicate text visually.

skills.description: Show an image on a screen or user interface.
skills.goal: Communicate image content visually.

skills.description: Use LEDs or lights to express status.
skills.goal: Communicate state through light patterns.

skills.description: Play a sound, tone, or audio file.
skills.goal: Communicate or alert through audio output.

skills.description: Receive and interpret spoken input.
skills.goal: Capture a user's spoken message.
postconditions: Speech input transcribed or timeout reported

skills.description: Receive text input from a user or external system.
skills.goal: Capture a textual message.

skills.description: Ask a user or external agent for confirmation.
skills.goal: Obtain approval before executing a risky or ambiguous action.
postconditions: Confirmation response received or timeout handled

skills.description: Notify a user of an event, state, or result.
skills.goal: Deliver a user-facing notification.

skills.description: Report robot, task, or mission status.
skills.goal: Expose current state to users or coordinating systems.

skills.description: Capture a still image from a camera.
skills.goal: Acquire an image for inspection or documentation.

skills.description: Capture video from a camera for a duration or stream.
skills.goal: Acquire video evidence or inspection footage.

skills.description: Scan an area using available perception sensors.
skills.goal: Collect sensor coverage over a target area.

skills.description: Inspect equipment for state, damage, readings, or anomalies.
skills.goal: Assess equipment condition.

skills.description: Inspect a surface for defects, contamination, or condition.
skills.goal: Assess the target surface.

skills.description: Scan using thermal sensing.
skills.goal: Measure or map thermal patterns.

skills.description: Measure gas concentration or detect gas presence.
skills.goal: Assess gas-related safety or environment conditions.

skills.description: Measure radiation level or detect radioactive sources.
skills.goal: Assess radiation-related safety conditions.

skills.description: Measure distance to a target, surface, or obstacle.
skills.goal: Return a range measurement.

skills.description: Measure temperature from a sensor or thermal image.
skills.goal: Return a temperature value.

skills.description: Measure humidity level.
skills.goal: Return relative humidity or moisture reading.

skills.description: Record selected sensor topics or data streams.
skills.goal: Persist sensor data for later analysis.

skills.description: Generate a structured inspection report from observations.
skills.goal: Produce a report summarizing inspection findings.

skills.description: Take a timestamped snapshot from a sensor or scene.
skills.goal: Capture a quick inspection snapshot.

skills.description: Survey an environment by navigating and collecting observations.
skills.goal: Produce broad situational or inspection coverage.

skills.description: Open an environmental door as part of interaction with the environment.
skills.goal: Make a passage available by opening the door.

skills.description: Close an environmental door.
skills.goal: Return a door to a closed state.

skills.description: Open a drawer in the environment.
skills.goal: Expose drawer contents.

skills.description: Close an open drawer in the environment.
skills.goal: Return drawer to a closed state.

skills.description: Press a button in the environment.
skills.goal: Activate the button-controlled function.

skills.description: Flip or toggle a switch in the environment.
skills.goal: Change a switch-controlled state.

skills.description: Turn a valve wheel, handle, or lever.
skills.goal: Change valve state or opening angle.

skills.description: Call, enter, select floor, or operate an elevator.
skills.goal: Use an elevator to support navigation between floors.
preconditions: Call panel reachable or API available
postconditions: Robot requested or completed elevator transition

skills.description: Interact with a conveyor for loading, unloading, or triggering motion.
skills.goal: Use a conveyor as part of a material flow task.

skills.description: Use a charging dock for power replenishment.
skills.goal: Dock, charge, or manage charging behavior.

skills.description: Place or drop an object into a disposal location.
skills.goal: Dispose of the target object.

skills.description: Pick up waste or debris from the environment.
skills.goal: Collect waste for disposal.

skills.description: Clean a surface using a tool, brush, cloth, spray, or similar mechanism.
skills.goal: Improve the cleanliness of a target surface.

skills.description: Arrange objects into target positions or an ordered layout.
skills.goal: Bring objects into the requested spatial arrangement.
postconditions: Objects arranged according to target layout

skills.description: Interact with an appliance through buttons, doors, handles, or interfaces.
skills.goal: Operate or query an appliance.

skills.description: Initialize robot software, hardware, or task context.
skills.goal: Bring the robot or subsystem into a ready state.

skills.description: Shut down robot software, hardware, or a subsystem.
skills.goal: Bring the robot or subsystem to a safe stopped state.

skills.description: Restart robot software or a subsystem.
skills.goal: Stop and reinitialize a subsystem.

skills.description: Reset a subsystem, error state, or task context.
skills.goal: Return a component to a known baseline state.

skills.description: Run internal health checks and diagnostics.
skills.goal: Assess whether the robot is healthy enough for operation.

skills.description: Calibrate one or more sensors.
skills.goal: Improve sensor accuracy or update calibration parameters.

skills.description: Calibrate manipulator joints, tool frames, or home positions.
skills.goal: Bring manipulator calibration into a valid state.

skills.description: Load a map for localization, navigation, or planning.
skills.goal: Make a stored map active.

skills.description: Save the current map to storage.
skills.goal: Persist mapping results.

skills.description: Start, reset, or update robot localization.
skills.goal: Maintain a valid robot pose estimate.

skills.description: Start recording selected robot data.
skills.goal: Begin persistent data recording.

skills.description: Stop active data recording.
skills.goal: Finalize persistent data recording.

skills.description: Start application or mission logging.
skills.goal: Begin logging events, diagnostics, or task state.

skills.description: Stop or reduce application or mission logging.
skills.goal: End logging or return logging to default behavior.

skills.description: Update runtime parameters for a node or subsystem.
skills.goal: Change configurable behavior without changing the ontology.
postconditions: Parameters updated or rejected with reason
